headline: Why The Micron Technology (MU) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Memory And Valuation Rethinks
summary: Micron Technology is back in the spotlight after a fresh analyst update lifted its fair value estimate from US$425.13 to US$526.48, a move that points to a meaningfully higher intrinsic value framework. A wave of recent research, centered on HBM, DRAM and NAND pricing, has pushed many firms to revisit their models, even as some voices warn that current conditions may already be baking in a lot of optimism. As you read on, you will see how to follow this evolving narrative and what it could...
